summary: A promotional landing page and syllabus for Andrew Ng's Machine Learning Specialization on DeepLearning.AI. The source outlines the course structure, which emphasizes a visual-first pedagogical approach to AI education and highlights modern machine learning practices like data-centric AI.

principles.statement: Teach machine learning concepts visually before introducing code and mathematical theory.
principles.rationale: Starting with an intuitive visual approach makes foundational AI concepts approachable for beginners who may not have a rigorous math or coding background.
principles.source_quote: Each lesson begins with a visual representation of machine learning concepts, followed by the code, followed by optional videos explaining the underlying math

principles.statement: Apply a data-centric approach to improve machine learning models.
principles.rationale: Model performance can be significantly improved by focusing on tuning the data itself through synthesis or augmentation, rather than solely tuning the model architecture.
principles.source_quote: Apply “data-centric AI” to not only tune your model but tune your data (using data synthesis or data augmentation) to improve your model’s performance.
